items.title: The North Face Presents: Earthside
items.blurb: Original score for The North Face's Earthside film.

blocks.label: The brief
blocks.text: The reveal film for the First Edition Ford Bronco x Filson, a premium 4x4 built around American craftsmanship and the backcountry.

blocks.label: What I did
blocks.text: Added live instruments and production to the score, weaving an Americana influence to match the Bronco x Filson world.

blocks.label: The result
blocks.text: A rugged, handmade-feeling sound for a flagship brand collaboration.

blocks.label: The brief
blocks.text: A Subaru brand film following artist and adventurer Brooklyn Bell.

blocks.label: What I did
blocks.text: Scored the film to picture, carrying Brooklyn's story without crowding it.

blocks.label: The result
blocks.text: An original score for a national Subaru brand film.

blocks.label: The brief
blocks.text: Athletic Brewing's first-ever documentary: Jason Hardrath's mission to summit 100 peaks faster than anyone, made with WZRD Media.

blocks.label: What I did
blocks.text: Composed the original score, tracking the highs and the grind of a record-setting endurance journey.

blocks.label: The result
blocks.text: A feature documentary score for Athletic Brewing's debut film.

blocks.label: The brief
blocks.text: La Sportiva's brand anthem, built around their For Your Mountain spirit.

blocks.label: What I did
blocks.text: Wrote an original anthem to match the drive and altitude of the brand.

blocks.label: The result
blocks.text: A signature musical identity for La Sportiva.

blocks.label: The brief
blocks.text: A Danner film following mycologist Elan Hagens into the old-growth forests of the Pacific Northwest.

blocks.label: What I did
blocks.text: Composed an original score attuned to the forest floor: patient, textured, and alive.

blocks.label: The result
blocks.text: An original score for Danner's Go There series.

blocks.label: The brief
blocks.text: An expedition film following MTB rider Payson McElveen across Tasmania, ridden with a philosophy unbound by the racing clock.

blocks.label: What I did
blocks.text: Scored the journey to picture, from the quiet stretches to the high points.

blocks.label: The result
blocks.text: A documentary score that carried the crossing.

blocks.label: The brief
blocks.text: Original music for the ANNA film trailer.

blocks.label: What I did
blocks.text: Scored the trailer to its rising tension, building a theme that tracked the cut.

blocks.label: The result
blocks.text: A trailer score that set the tone for the film.

blocks.label: The brief
blocks.text: A brand film for Channel (Bayer): "Your fields. Your rules.", built around its seedsmen and plant breeders.

blocks.label: What I did
blocks.text: Scored the spot to land its message with momentum in a short runtime.

blocks.label: The result
blocks.text: A commercial score for a national agriculture brand.
